text.heading: TODO

p.underline: Application to Register for Less than 15 Units Course in the Harmattan Semester of 2005/2006 Session

text.p: I hereby apply to be allowed to register for less than fifteen (15) units course in the Harmattan Semester of 2005/2006 session. The courses are SSC 107 - Man and his Physical Environment (3 Units), SOC 201 - Introduction to Sociology and Anthropology (3 Units), CSS 221 - Computer Appreciation (2 Units) I am an extra Part IV student with matriculation number
I shall be grateful if my application is favourably considered and granted. Thank you.
